title: Add configured manual/static location producer
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.5 adds a dedicated manual/static app-interface producer API that submits MANUAL_STATIC samples to the unified HAL provider, but no persistent gateway config or board configuration surface currently feeds it. What needs to be done: define the configured manual/static location surface, parse/validate latitude/longitude/accuracy/source_name/freshness policy, call lichen_app_interface_submit_manual_location() or lichen_hal_location_submit(), expose status metadata, and add native_sim/qemu tests proving configured static location overrides lower-priority sources and stale config suppresses position fields.
notes: Implemented configured manual/static location producer no-hardware scope. Changes: /config PUT now decodes optional manual_location CBOR with lat_i/lon_i required, optional hacc_mm/age_s/source_name, duplicate known key rejection, lat/lon bounds, malformed/trailing CBOR rejection; config apply helper submits MANUAL_STATIC through app-interface/HAL before mutating tx power or stored config; /config GET returns stored manual_location after successful apply; gateway app links config_apply and enables CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE; gateway_config Twister test covers decode/encode, invalid/duplicate/trailing payloads, atomic apply failure, manual override over network source, stale manual suppressing position fields, native_sim and qemu_x86 integration platforms. EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr: git diff --check PASS; west twister -T lichen/tests/gateway_config -T lichen/tests/gateway_status -T lichen/tests/app_interface -T lichen/tests/hal -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --integration --outdir twister-out-manual-config-location-v4 -x=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS: 6 scenarios, 10 instances selected, 9/10 configs passed, 1 static skip, 134 cases executed, 26 skipped, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 warnings, 177.28s; west build -p always -b qemu_x86 lichen/apps/gateway -d build-gateway-qemu-manual-config-v3 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen PASS, RAM 246236 B / 31 MB (0.76%). Notable warnings: Zephyr qemu test-only CONFIG_TIMER_RANDOM_GENERATOR warning; empty drivers__entropy and drivers__spi source library warnings. Final codereviews: Banach the 5th no P0/P1/P2, noted unused string.h and future invalid encoder caller robustness as non-blocking; Lovelace the 5th no P0/P1/P2, noted P3 duplicate lon_i/hacc_mm/age_s and unknown nested extension coverage; Volta the 5th no P0/P1/P2, noted source_name embedded NUL policy and config_get encode-zero defensive behavior as residual risk. Follow-up created for non-blocking review hardening: project-LICHEN-zte2.10. User GNSS build-time epoch idea captured separately as project-LICHEN-ecq7.
close_reason: Completed configured manual/static location producer no-hardware scope. Implemented /config manual_location CBOR parse/readback, atomic app-interface/HAL MANUAL_STATIC submission, status/HAL stale behavior coverage, native_sim/qemu Twister coverage, and qemu gateway app build validation. Evidence recorded in notes; non-blocking review hardening filed as project-LICHEN-zte2.10.
